title: BallsPack 3000
description: BallsPack 3000 is the continuation of BallsPack 2000. It includes new features, improved performance, and updated to 1.20.1.
body:
## Welcome to the "BallsPack 3000" Modpack! This modpack is primarily intended for our official server but it can also be used in your server or singleplayer if you wish. It doesn't have a specific topic, so it's more like a general purpose modpack. This is the updated version of 2000, including new stuff, and removing some. ### Features: 1. **Expansive World Generation**: Say goodbye to mundane landscapes! "BallsPack 3000" introduces exciting new biomes, realistic terrain, and jaw-dropping vistas. Explore lush forests, treacherous mountains, and mysterious dimensions brimming with secrets and challenges. 2. **Tech and Magic Integration**: In this modpack, technology and magic are no longer exclusive domains. Engage in a seamless integration of tech and magic mods, offering diverse paths for progression. Power your machines with arcane energies or combine futuristic gadgets with ancient spells. 3. **Extensive Mod Compatibility**: We have worked to ensure that mods work together. Enjoy a stable and smooth gameplay experience, thanks to testing and mod compatibility optimization. 4. **Automation**: Automate your gathering, crafting, and processing with automation mods such as Create or Applied Energistics, allowing you to focus on exploration and creativity. 5. **Computers**: With the ComputerCraft mod you can create computers, develop, or even be the new Bill Gates of the server if you wish. 6. **Multiplayer Compatibility**: Invite your friends! Our modpack works with servers(we have one). ### Important mods: - **Create Fabric**: A mod that adds mechanical contraptions, machines, and automation to the game. It also has compatibility with other mods such as Applied Energistics 2 and Terralith. - **Applied Energistics 2**: A mod that allows storing, managing, and automating items, fluids, and energy using a network of devices and terminals. - **Minecraft Transit Railway**: A mod that adds realistic trains, stations, and tracks to the game. It also has compatibility with other mods such as Station Decoration and Nemo's Transit Expansion for more customization options. - **MCA Reborn**: A mod that adds villagers with improved AI, interactions, and relationships to the game. It also has integration with other mods such as Emotecraft and Chat Heads for more immersive communication. ### Official Discord Server: We have an official server for this modpack!
You can join today! https://discord.gg/3agFE8fWg2
